name: 五子棋
description: 经典五子棋游戏，玩家（黑子）与程序（白子）在15x15棋盘上对战，率先五子连珠者获胜
description_en: Classic Gomoku (Five in a Row) game. Player (black) vs AI (white) on a 15x15 board. First to get five in a row wins

apis.name: startGame
apis.desc: 开始五子棋游戏，玩家执黑先手，返回初始棋盘状态
apis.desc_en: Start a new Gomoku game. Player plays black and goes first. Returns initial board state

apis.name: placeStone
apis.desc: 玩家在指定位置落子（行列从0开始），程序随后自动回应，返回更新后的棋盘状态
apis.desc_en: Player places a stone at the specified position (row/col 0-based). AI responds automatically. Returns updated board

apis.name: getState
apis.desc: 获取当前游戏状态，包括棋盘、当前回合、胜负情况等
apis.desc_en: Get current game state including board, current turn, win/loss status
